name: tramstec
displayName: TramsTec — WhatsApp Memory & Business Context Infrastructure for LATAM
description: Persistent WhatsApp memory and business-context infrastructure for AI agents operating in Latin America. Native MCP server with semantic memory (pgvector), automatic CRM enrichment, order/lead extraction, and LATAM-specific workflows (SAT, CFDI, SPEI, OXXO). Bring your own LLM (Claude, OpenAI Agents, LangChain, Cursor, n8n, custom).

tiers.name: Developer
tiers.notes: Free forever, single org, for experimentation.

tiers.name: Builder
tiers.notes: First product in production, 1 org, 1 WhatsApp number.

tiers.name: Agency
tiers.notes: Up to 5 organizations, scoped keys, priority support.

tiers.name: Enterprise
tiers.notes: Custom: dedicated infra, on-prem option, 99.95% SLA, MSA/NDA/DPA.

transports.notes: Multi-tenant production. API key issued after sign-up. Scopes supported.
For clients that do not speak MCP natively (n8n, Make, custom HTTP).

tools.name: getCustomerContext
tools.description: Identity, last orders, interests, commercial stage, language, sentiment for a phone number. Returns AI-ready business context.

tools.name: getCommercialHistory
tools.description: Clean cronology of orders, payments, quotes, returns, and pending follow-ups for a customer.

tools.name: getPendingFollowUps
tools.description: Auto-detected items pending reply, quote, payment, or delivery across the org. The closes-the-loop tool.

tools.name: extractPurchaseIntent
tools.description: Parses free-form WhatsApp text into structured purchase intent: category, priceRange, urgency, confidence.

tools.name: extractLeadInsights
tools.description: CRM enrichment: score, vertical, inferred budget, urgency, best channel — from conversation signals.

tools.name: extractOrdersFromConversation
tools.description: Pulls structured orders (SKU, qty, amount, address, dates) from chat text. No prompt engineering required.

tools.name: searchBusinessMemory
tools.description: Semantic vector search (pgvector / HNSW) across the entire business memory. p95 < 50ms.

tools.name: getCustomerRelationshipSummary
tools.description: Executive summary per customer: LTV, frequency, favorites, churn risk, upsell opportunities.

tools.name: sendMessage
tools.description: Send a WhatsApp text message. Respects opt-out and 24h window; auto-switches to template when needed.

tools.name: sendTemplate
tools.description: Send a Meta-approved WhatsApp template. Requires opt-in.

tools.name: sendMedia
tools.description: Send image/document/audio/video. Hosted upload + auto-resend on Meta hiccups.

tools.name: createOrder
tools.description: Create an order (draft by default). Idempotent via client_request_id.

tools.name: confirmOrder
tools.description: Confirm a draft order with explicit customer evidence.

tools.name: createPaymentLink
tools.description: Generate checkout link via Stripe, Mercado Pago, Conekta, Openpay, PIX.

tools.name: generateSpeiInstructions
tools.description: Mexican SPEI bank-transfer instructions with unique reference. Auto-reconciliation.

tools.name: generateInvoice
tools.description: CFDI 4.0 stamping via Facturapi with org's RFC.

tools.name: handoffToHuman
tools.description: Escalate to a human operator with structured reason, urgency, and conversation summary.

tools.name: updateConsent
tools.description: Apply opt-in or opt-out with auditable evidence (LFPDPPP compliant).

prompts.name: sales_agent_es_mx
prompts.description: Mexico-Spanish sales agent prompt with TramsTec memory hooks.

prompts.name: support_agent_es_mx
prompts.description: Mexico-Spanish support agent prompt with context retrieval.

prompts.name: collections_agent_es_mx
prompts.description: Stage-aware collections prompt with follow-up tracking.

prompts.name: vertical_agent_template
prompts.description: Skeleton for vertical AI agents (clinics, logistics, real estate, retail).

prompts.name: human_handoff_summary
prompts.description: Conversation summarization optimized for human operators.

compliance: PCI DSS pass-through via Stripe / Mercado Pago (we never store card data)
audience: LATAM businesses operating sales/support/collections on WhatsApp
Vertical AI startups (fintech, healthtech, retailtech, logistics)
